description: Search and audit NIST NVD CVEs by keyword, severity, CWE, CISA KEV status, and CPE.
name: io.github.cyanheads/nist-nvd-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: NVD API key. Without it, rate limit is 5 req/30s; with it, 50 req/30s. Get one free at nvd.nist.gov/developers/request-an-api-key.
environmentVariables.name: NVD_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Per-request timeout in milliseconds. Raise to 60000 when using nvd_get_cve_history without an API key.
environmentVariables.name: NVD_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS

environmentVariables.description: The hostname for the HTTP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST

environmentVariables.description: The port to run the HTTP server on.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT

environmentVariables.description: The endpoint path for the MCP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').
environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
